audit_items.proof_trace: Implementation correctly uses (block_root, slot, proposer_index, index) instead of spec's (slot, proposer_index, index) tuple. The block_root inclusion is intentional to handle double proposals—without it, sidecars from equivocating proposers would conflict, preventing collection of complete sidecar sets for both blocks (see blob_quarantine.nim hasSidecarImpl L387-402 and gossip_validation.nim L433-483 explanation).
